title: Finding
description: A single accessibility issue reported by any agent (screen_reader, visual, motor, axe_baseline).

element_ref.description: Matches a data-a11y-id injected into the DOM, format 'a11y-<int>'.

issue_type.description: e.g. missing_alt, meaningless_alt, low_contrast, unreachable, small_target, focus_trap, illogical_tab_order

wcag_criterion.description: Must be present in wcag22_criteria.json, e.g. '1.1.1'.

evidence.description: Short factual string describing what was actually observed.
